001/*
002 * Licensed to the Apache Software Foundation (ASF) under one or more
003 * contributor license agreements.  See the NOTICE file distributed with
004 * this work for additional information regarding copyright ownership.
005 * The ASF licenses this file to You under the Apache License, Version 2.0
006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with
007 * the License.  You may obtain a copy of the License at
008 *
009 *      http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
010 *
011 * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
013 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
014 * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.marshall.xml;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.AssertionUtils.*;
020import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.CollectionUtils.*;
021import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.IoUtils.*;
022import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Utils.*;
023import static org.apache.juneau.marshall.xml.XmlFormat.*;
024import static org.apache.juneau.marshall.xml.XmlSerializerSession.ContentResult.*;
025import static org.apache.juneau.marshall.xml.XmlSerializerSession.JsonType.*;
026
027import java.io.*;
028import java.lang.reflect.*;
029import java.time.*;
030import java.time.temporal.*;
031import java.util.*;
032import java.util.AbstractMap.SimpleEntry;
033import java.util.function.*;
034
035import org.apache.juneau.commons.bean.*;
036import org.apache.juneau.commons.lang.*;
037import org.apache.juneau.marshall.*;
038import org.apache.juneau.marshall.serializer.*;
039import org.apache.juneau.marshall.stream.*;
040
041/**
042 * Session object that lives for the duration of a single use of {@link XmlSerializer}.
043 *
044 * <h5 class='section'>Notes:</h5><ul>
045 *    <li class='warn'>This class is not thread safe and is typically discarded after one use.
046 * </ul>
047 *
048 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
049 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/XmlBasics">XML Basics</a>
050
051 * </ul>
052 */
053@SuppressWarnings({
054   "java:S110", // Deep inheritance inherent to the serializer/parser session hierarchy
055   "rawtypes",  // Raw Map/Collection necessary for serializer dispatch over heterogeneous types
056   "unchecked", // Type erasure requires unchecked casts in serializer dispatch
057   "resource",  // Writer/Closeable resources managed by try-with-resources; analyzer FP in lambdas
058   "java:S115"  // Constants use naming conventions that embed type info or config keys (e.g. PROP_addNamespaceUrisToRoot)
059})
060public class XmlSerializerSession extends WriterSerializerSession implements RecordWritable {
061
062   // Property name constants
063   private static final String PROP_addNamespaceUrisToRoot = "addNamespaceUrisToRoot";
064   private static final String PROP_autoDetectNamespaces = "autoDetectNamespaces";
065   private static final String PROP_defaultNamespace = "defaultNamespace";
066   private static final String PROP_enableNamespaces = "enableNamespaces";
067   private static final String PROP_textNodeDelimiter = "textNodeDelimiter";
068   private static final String PROP_XmlSerializerSession_addNamespaceUrisToRoot = "XmlSerializerSession.addNamespaceUrisToRoot";
069   private static final String PROP_XmlSerializerSession_autoDetectNamespaces = "XmlSerializerSession.autoDetectNamespaces";
070   private static final String PROP_XmlSerializerSession_defaultNamespace = "XmlSerializerSession.defaultNamespace";
071   private static final String PROP_XmlSerializerSession_enableNamespaces = "XmlSerializerSession.enableNamespaces";
072   private static final String PROP_XmlSerializerSession_textNodeDelimiter = "XmlSerializerSession.textNodeDelimiter";
073
074   // Argument name constants for assertArgNotNull
075   private static final String ARG_ctx = "ctx";
076
077   /**
078    * Builder class.
079    */
080   @SuppressWarnings({
081      "java:S119" // 'SELF' (CRTP self-type) is intentional and clearer than a single-letter name.
082   })
083   public abstract static class Builder<SELF extends Builder<SELF>> extends WriterSerializerSession.Builder<SELF> {
084
085      private boolean addNamespaceUrisToRoot;
086      private boolean autoDetectNamespaces;
087      private String defaultNamespace;
088      private boolean enableNamespaces;
089      private String textNodeDelimiter;
090      private XmlSerializer ctx;
091
092      /**
093       * Constructor
094       *
095       * @param ctx The context creating this session.
096       *    <br>Cannot be <jk>null</jk>.
097       */
098      protected Builder(XmlSerializer ctx) {
099         super(assertArgNotNull(ARG_ctx, ctx));
100         this.ctx = ctx;
101         addNamespaceUrisToRoot = ctx.isAddNamespaceUrlsToRoot();
102         autoDetectNamespaces = ctx.isAutoDetectNamespaces();
103         defaultNamespace = ctx.getDefaultNamespace() == null ? null : ctx.getDefaultNamespace().toString();
104         enableNamespaces = ctx.isEnableNamespaces();
105         textNodeDelimiter = ctx.getTextNodeDelimiter();
106      }
107
108      @Override
109      public XmlSerializerSession build() {
110         return new XmlSerializerSession(this);
111      }
112
113      /**
114       * Add namespace URLs to the root element.
115       *
116       * @param value The new value for this setting.
117       * @return This object.
118       */
119      public SELF addNamespaceUrisToRoot(boolean value) {
120         addNamespaceUrisToRoot = value;
121         return self();
122      }
123
124      /**
125       * Auto-detect namespace usage.
126       *
127       * @param value The new value for this setting.
128       * @return This object.
129       */
130      public SELF autoDetectNamespaces(boolean value) {
131         autoDetectNamespaces = value;
132         return self();
133      }
134
135      /**
136       * Default namespace.
137       *
138       * @param value The new value for this setting.
139       * @return This object.
140       */
141      public SELF defaultNamespace(String value) {
142         defaultNamespace = value;
143         return self();
144      }
145
146      /**
147       * Enable support for XML namespaces.
148       *
149       * @param value The new value for this setting.
150       * @return This object.
151       */
152      public SELF enableNamespaces(boolean value) {
153         enableNamespaces = value;
154         return self();
155      }
156
157      /**
158       * Text node delimiter.
159       *
160       * @param value The new value for this setting.
161       * @return This object.
162       */
163      public SELF textNodeDelimiter(String value) {
164         textNodeDelimiter = value == null ? "" : value;
165         return self();
166      }
167
168      @Override /* Overridden from Builder */
169      public SELF property(String key, Object value) {
170         if (key == null) { super.property(key, value); return self(); }
171         switch (key) {
172            case PROP_addNamespaceUrisToRoot, PROP_XmlSerializerSession_addNamespaceUrisToRoot:
173               return addNamespaceUrisToRoot(cvt(value, Boolean.class));
174            case PROP_autoDetectNamespaces, PROP_XmlSerializerSession_autoDetectNamespaces:
175               return autoDetectNamespaces(cvt(value, Boolean.class));
176            case PROP_defaultNamespace, PROP_XmlSerializerSession_defaultNamespace:
177               return defaultNamespace(cvt(value, String.class));
178            case PROP_enableNamespaces, PROP_XmlSerializerSession_enableNamespaces:
179               return enableNamespaces(cvt(value, Boolean.class));
180            case PROP_textNodeDelimiter, PROP_XmlSerializerSession_textNodeDelimiter:
181               return textNodeDelimiter(cvt(value, String.class));
182            default:
183               super.property(key, value);
184               return self();
185         }
186      }
187
188   }
189
190   /**
191    * Concrete default builder leaf for the non-subclassed {@code create()} path (CRTP terminal).
192    */
193   public static final class DefaultBuilder extends Builder<DefaultBuilder> {
194
195      DefaultBuilder(XmlSerializer ctx) {
196         super(ctx);
197      }
198   }
199
200   /**
201    * Identifies what the contents were of a serialized bean.
202    */
203   public enum ContentResult {
204      CR_VOID,      // No content...append "/>" to the start tag.
205      CR_EMPTY,     // No content...append "/>" to the start tag if XML, "/></end>" if HTML.
206      CR_MIXED,     // Mixed content...don't add whitespace.
207      CR_ELEMENTS   // Elements...use normal whitespace rules.
208   }
209
210   enum JsonType {
211      STRING("string"), BOOLEAN("boolean"), NUMBER("number"), ARRAY("array"), OBJECT("object"), NULL("null");
212
213      private final String value;
214
215      JsonType(String value) {
216         this.value = value;
217      }
218
219      @Override
220      public String toString() {
221         return value;
222      }
223
224      @SuppressWarnings({
225         "java:S1871" // return true is the only correct action here; coincidental match with isXmlText is not a logic error
226      })
227      boolean isOneOf(JsonType...types) {
228         for (var type : types)
229            if (type == this)
230               return true;
231         return false;
232      }
233   }
234
235   /**
236    * Creates a new builder for this object.
237    *
238    * @param ctx The context creating this session.
239    *    <br>Cannot be <jk>null</jk>.
240    * @return A new builder.
241    */
242   @SuppressWarnings({
243      "java:S1452" // Builder<?> wildcard return intentional; callers use it to construct session instances polymorphically
244   })
245   public static Builder<?> create(XmlSerializer ctx) {
246      return new DefaultBuilder(assertArgNotNull(ARG_ctx, ctx));
247   }
248
249   private final String textNodeDelimiter;
250   private final boolean addNamespaceUrisToRoot;
251   private final boolean autoDetectNamespaces;
252   private final boolean enableNamespaces;
253   private final XmlSerializer ctx;
254   private Namespace defaultNamespace;
255   private List<Namespace> namespaces = new ArrayList<>();
256
257   /**
258    * Constructor.
259    *
260    * @param builder The builder for this object.
261    */
262   protected XmlSerializerSession(Builder<?> builder) {
263      super(builder);
264      ctx = builder.ctx;
265      addNamespaceUrisToRoot = builder.addNamespaceUrisToRoot;
266      autoDetectNamespaces = builder.autoDetectNamespaces;
267      enableNamespaces = builder.enableNamespaces;
268      textNodeDelimiter = builder.textNodeDelimiter;
269      defaultNamespace = findDefaultNamespace(
270         builder.defaultNamespace != null ? Namespace.create(builder.defaultNamespace) : ctx.getDefaultNamespace()
271      );
272      var ctxNamespaces = ctx.getNamespaces();
273      namespaces = ctxNamespaces == null ? new ArrayList<>() : new ArrayList<>(ctxNamespaces);
274   }
275
276   /**
277    * Returns the language-specific metadata on the specified bean.
278    *
279    * @param bm The bean to return the metadata on.
280    * @return The metadata.
281    */
282   public XmlBeanMeta getXmlBeanMeta(BeanMeta<?> bm) {
283      return ctx.getXmlBeanMeta(bm);
284   }
285
286   /**
287    * Returns the language-specific metadata on the specified bean property.
288    *
289    * @param bpm The bean property to return the metadata on.
290    * @return The metadata.
291    */
292   public XmlBeanPropertyMeta getXmlBeanPropertyMeta(BeanPropertyMeta bpm) {
293      return bpm == null ? XmlBeanPropertyMeta.DEFAULT : ctx.getXmlBeanPropertyMeta(bpm);
294   }
295
296   /**
297    * Returns the language-specific metadata on the specified class.
298    *
299    * @param cm The class to return the metadata on.
300    * @return The metadata.
301    */
302   public XmlClassMeta getXmlClassMeta(ClassMeta<?> cm) {
303      return ctx.getXmlClassMeta(cm);
304   }
305
306   /**
307    * Converts the specified output target object to an {@link XmlWriter}.
308    *
309    * @param out The output target object.
310    * @return The output target object wrapped in an {@link XmlWriter}.
311    */
312   public final XmlWriter getXmlWriter(SerializerPipe out) {
313      var output = out.getRawOutput();
314      if (output instanceof XmlWriter output2)
315         return output2;
316      var w = new XmlWriter(out.getWriter(), isUseWhitespace(), getMaxIndent(), isTrimStrings(), getQuoteChar(), getUriResolver(), isEnableNamespaces(), defaultNamespace);
317      out.setWriter(w);
318      return w;
319   }
320
321   /*
322    * Add a namespace to this session.
323    *
324    * @param ns The namespace being added.
325    */
326   private void addNamespace(Namespace ns) {
327      if (ns == defaultNamespace)
328         return;
329
330      for (var n : namespaces)
331         if (n == ns)
332            return;
333
334      if (nn(defaultNamespace) && (ns.uri.equals(defaultNamespace.uri) || ns.name.equals(defaultNamespace.name)))
335         defaultNamespace = ns;
336      else
337         namespaces = addAll(namespaces, ns);
338   }
339
340   private Namespace findDefaultNamespace(Namespace n) {
341      if (n == null)
342         return null;
343      if (nn(n.name) && nn(n.uri))
344         return n;
345      if (n.uri == null) {
346         for (var n2 : getNamespaces())
347            if (n2.name.equals(n.name))
348               return n2;
349      }
350      if (n.name == null) {
351         for (var n2 : getNamespaces())
352            if (n2.uri.equals(n.uri))
353               return n2;
354      }
355      return n;
356   }
357
358   /**
359    * Checks if an object is a text node (String or primitive type).
360    */
361   private static boolean isTextNode(Object o) {
362      if (o == null)
363         return false;
364      var c = o.getClass();
365      // Text nodes are strings and primitives (not beans, collections, arrays, or other complex types)
366      return CharSequence.class.isAssignableFrom(c) || Number.class.isAssignableFrom(c) || Boolean.class.isAssignableFrom(c) || c.isPrimitive();
367   }
368
369   private boolean isXmlText(XmlFormat format, ClassMeta<?> sType) {
370      if (format == XMLTEXT)
371         return true;
372      var xcm = getXmlClassMeta(sType);
373      if (xcm == null)
374         return false;
375      return xcm.getFormat() == XMLTEXT;
376   }
377
378   private Optional<Map.Entry<String,Object>> getPropertyKeyValueIfNotIgnored(BeanPropertyValue p, BeanPropertyMeta pMeta) {
379      var key = p.getName();
380      var value = p.getValue();
381      if (nn(p.getThrown()))
382         onBeanGetterException(pMeta, p.getThrown());
383      if (canIgnoreValue(pMeta, key, value))
384         return opte();
385      return opt(new SimpleEntry<>(key, value));
386   }
387
388   @SuppressWarnings({
389      "null", // Null handling verified by context or framework
390      "java:S3776", // Cognitive complexity acceptable for this specific logic
391      "java:S6541", // Single-threaded session contexts do not require synchronization
392   })
393   private ContentResult serializeBeanMap(XmlWriter out, BeanMap<?> m, Namespace elementNs, boolean isCollapsed, boolean isMixedOrText) throws SerializeException {
394      boolean hasChildren = false;
395      var bm = m.getMeta();
396
397      var lp = new ArrayList<BeanPropertyValue>();
398
399      var checkNull = (Predicate<Object>)(x -> isKeepNullProperties() || nn(x));
400      m.forEachValue(checkNull, (pMeta, key, value, thrown) -> lp.add(new BeanPropertyValue(pMeta, key, value, thrown)));
401
402      var xbm = getXmlBeanMeta(bm);
403
404      // @formatter:off
405      Set<String> attrs = xbm.getAttrPropertyNames();
406      Set<String> elements = xbm.getElementPropertyNames();
407      Set<String> collapsedElements = xbm.getCollapsedPropertyNames();
408      var attrsProperty = xbm.getAttrsPropertyName();
409      var contentProperty = xbm.getContentPropertyName();
410      // @formatter:on
411
412      XmlFormat cf = null;
413
414      Object content = null;
415      ClassMeta<?> contentType = null;
416      for (var p : lp) {
417         var n = p.getName();
418         if (attrs.contains(n) || attrs.contains("*") || n.equals(attrsProperty)) {
419            var pMeta = p.getMeta();
420            if (pMeta.canRead()) {
421               var kv = getPropertyKeyValueIfNotIgnored(p, pMeta);
422               if (kv.isEmpty())
423                  continue;
424               var key = kv.get().getKey();
425               var value = kv.get().getValue();
426               var bpXml = getXmlBeanPropertyMeta(pMeta);
427               var ns = (isEnableNamespaces() && bpXml.getNamespace() != elementNs ? bpXml.getNamespace() : null);
428
429               if (pMeta.isUri()) {
430                  out.attrUri(ns, key, value);
431               } else if (n.equals(attrsProperty)) {
432                  if (value instanceof BeanMap<?> value2) {
433                     value2.forEachValue(x -> true, (pMeta2, key2, value3, thrown2) -> {
434                        if (nn(thrown2))
435                           onBeanGetterException(pMeta, thrown2);
436                        out.attr(ns, key2, value3);
437                     });
438                  } else /* Map */ {
439                     var m2 = (Map)value;
440                     if (nn(m2))
441                        m2.forEach((k, v) -> out.attr(ns, s(k), v));
442                  }
443               } else {
444                  out.attr(ns, key, value);
445               }
446            }
447         }
448      }
449
450      boolean hasContent = false;
451      boolean preserveWhitespace = false;
452      boolean isVoidElement = xbm.getContentFormat() == VOID;
453
454      for (var p : lp) {
455         BeanPropertyMeta pMeta = p.getMeta();
456         if (pMeta.canRead()) {
457            ClassMeta<?> cMeta = (ClassMeta<?>) p.getBeanInfo();
458
459            var n = p.getName();
460            if (n.equals(contentProperty)) {
461               content = p.getValue();
462               contentType = (ClassMeta<?>) p.getBeanInfo();
463               hasContent = true;
464               cf = xbm.getContentFormat();
465               if (cf.isOneOf(MIXED, MIXED_PWS, TEXT, TEXT_PWS, XMLTEXT))
466                  isMixedOrText = true;
467               if (cf.isOneOf(MIXED_PWS, TEXT_PWS))
468                  preserveWhitespace = true;
469               if ((contentType.isCollection() && ((Collection)content).isEmpty()) || (contentType.isArray() && Array.getLength(content) == 0))
470                  hasContent = false;
471            } else if (elements.contains(n) || collapsedElements.contains(n) || elements.contains("*") || collapsedElements.contains("*")) {
472               var kv = getPropertyKeyValueIfNotIgnored(p, pMeta);
473               if (kv.isEmpty())
474                  continue;
475               var key = kv.get().getKey();
476               var value = kv.get().getValue();
477               if (! hasChildren) {
478                  hasChildren = true;
479                  out.appendIf(! isCollapsed, '>').nlIf(! isMixedOrText, indent);
480               }
481
482               var bpXml = getXmlBeanPropertyMeta(pMeta);
483               serializeAnything(out, value, cMeta, key, null, bpXml.getNamespace(), false, bpXml.getXmlFormat(), isMixedOrText, false, pMeta);
484            }
485         }
486      }
487      if (contentProperty == null && ! hasContent) {
488         if (hasChildren) {
489            return CR_ELEMENTS;
490         } else if (isVoidElement) {
491            return CR_VOID;
492         } else {
493            return CR_EMPTY;
494         }
495      }
496
497      // Serialize XML content.
498      if (nn(content)) {
499         out.w('>').nlIf(! isMixedOrText, indent);
500         if (contentType == null) {
501            // No content type specified - skip content serialization
502         } else if (contentType.isCollection()) {
503            var c = (Collection)content;
504            boolean previousWasTextNode = false;
505            for (var value : c) {
506               boolean currentIsTextNode = isTextNode(value);
507               // Insert delimiter between consecutive text nodes
508               if (previousWasTextNode && currentIsTextNode && nn(textNodeDelimiter) && ! textNodeDelimiter.isEmpty()) {
509                  out.append(textNodeDelimiter);
510               }
511               serializeAnything(out, value, contentType.getElementType(), null, null, null, false, cf, isMixedOrText, preserveWhitespace, null);
512               previousWasTextNode = currentIsTextNode;
513            }
514         } else if (contentType.isArray()) {
515            var c = toList(Object[].class, content);
516            boolean previousWasTextNode = false;
517            for (var value : c) {
518               boolean currentIsTextNode = isTextNode(value);
519               // Insert delimiter between consecutive text nodes
520               if (previousWasTextNode && currentIsTextNode && nn(textNodeDelimiter) && ! textNodeDelimiter.isEmpty()) {
521                  out.append(textNodeDelimiter);
522               }
523               serializeAnything(out, value, contentType.getElementType(), null, null, null, false, cf, isMixedOrText, preserveWhitespace, null);
524               previousWasTextNode = currentIsTextNode;
525            }
526         } else {
527            serializeAnything(out, content, contentType, null, null, null, false, cf, isMixedOrText, preserveWhitespace, null);
528         }
529      } else {
530         if (isAddJsonTags())
531            out.attr("nil", "true");
532         out.w('>').nlIf(! isMixedOrText, indent);
533      }
534      return isMixedOrText ? CR_MIXED : CR_ELEMENTS;
535   }
536
537   private XmlWriter serializeCollection(XmlWriter out, Object in, ClassMeta<?> sType, ClassMeta<?> eType, BeanPropertyMeta ppMeta, boolean isMixed) throws SerializeException {
538
539      var eeType = eType.getElementType();
540
541      var c = (sType.isCollection() ? (Collection)in : toList(sType.inner(), in));
542
543      String type2 = null;
544
545      var eName = Holder.of(type2);
546      var eNs = Holder.<Namespace>empty();
547
548      if (nn(ppMeta)) {
549         XmlBeanPropertyMeta bpXml = getXmlBeanPropertyMeta(ppMeta);
550         eName.set(bpXml.getChildName());
551         eNs.set(bpXml.getNamespace());
552      }
553
554      // Track if previous element was a text node for delimiter insertion
555      var previousWasTextNode = Holder.of(false);
556
557      forEachEntry(c, x -> {
558         var currentIsTextNode = isTextNode(x);
559
560         // Insert delimiter between consecutive text nodes
561         if (isTrue(previousWasTextNode.get()) && currentIsTextNode && nn(textNodeDelimiter) && ! textNodeDelimiter.isEmpty()) {
562            out.append(textNodeDelimiter);
563         }
564
565         serializeAnything(out, x, eeType, null, eName.get(), eNs.get(), false, XmlFormat.DEFAULT, isMixed, false, null);
566         previousWasTextNode.set(currentIsTextNode);
567      });
568
569      return out;
570   }
571
572   private XmlWriter serializeStreamable(XmlWriter out, Object in, ClassMeta<?> sType, ClassMeta<?> eType, BeanPropertyMeta ppMeta, boolean isMixed) throws SerializeException {
573
574      var eeType = eType.getElementType();
575
576      var eName = Holder.<String>empty();
577      var eNs = Holder.<Namespace>empty();
578
579      if (nn(ppMeta)) {
580         XmlBeanPropertyMeta bpXml = getXmlBeanPropertyMeta(ppMeta);
581         eName.set(bpXml.getChildName());
582         eNs.set(bpXml.getNamespace());
583      }
584
585      var previousWasTextNode = Holder.of(false);
586
587      forEachStreamableEntry(in, sType, x -> {
588         var currentIsTextNode = isTextNode(x);
589
590         if (isTrue(previousWasTextNode.get()) && currentIsTextNode && nn(textNodeDelimiter) && ! textNodeDelimiter.isEmpty()) {
591            out.append(textNodeDelimiter);
592         }
593
594         serializeAnything(out, x, eeType, null, eName.get(), eNs.get(), false, XmlFormat.DEFAULT, isMixed, false, null);
595         previousWasTextNode.set(currentIsTextNode);
596      });
597
598      return out;
599   }
600
601   private ContentResult serializeMap(XmlWriter out, Map m, ClassMeta<?> sType, ClassMeta<?> eKeyType, ClassMeta<?> eValueType, boolean isMixed) throws SerializeException {
602
603      var keyType = eKeyType == null ? sType.getKeyType() : eKeyType;
604      var valueType = eValueType == null ? sType.getValueType() : eValueType;
605
606      var hasChildren = Flag.create();
607      forEachEntry(m, e -> {
608
609         var k = e.getKey();
610         if (k == null) {
611            k = "\u0000";
612         } else {
613            k = generalize(k, keyType);
614            if (isTrimStrings() && k instanceof String)
615               k = k.toString().trim();
616         }
617
618         var value = e.getValue();
619
620         hasChildren.ifNotSet(() -> out.w('>').nlIf(! isMixed, indent)).set();
621         serializeAnything(out, value, valueType, toString(k), null, null, false, XmlFormat.DEFAULT, isMixed, false, null);
622      });
623
624      return hasChildren.isSet() ? CR_ELEMENTS : CR_EMPTY;
625   }
626
627   @Override /* Overridden from Serializer */
628   protected void doSerialize(SerializerPipe out, Object o) throws IOException, SerializeException {
629      if (isEnableNamespaces() && isAutoDetectNamespaces())
630         findNsfMappings(o);
631      serializeAnything(getXmlWriter(out), o, getExpectedRootType(o), null, null, null, isEnableNamespaces() && isAddNamespaceUrisToRoot(), XmlFormat.DEFAULT, false, false, null);
632   }
633
634   /**
635    * Opens a whole-value push generator targeting XML output, bound to this live session.
636    *
637    * <p>
638    * Because XML's wire format (attributes, namespaces, mixed content) is non-trivial to expose
639    * as a fine-grained token writer, this implementation supports only the cursor-level POJO
640    * bridge &mdash; {@link RecordWriter#write(Object) write(Object)} delegates to
641    * {@link SerializerSession#serialize(Object, Object)}.
642    *
643    * @param output The output.
644    * @return A new {@link RecordWriter}.
645    * @throws IOException If a problem occurred opening the underlying output.
646    */
647   @Override /* RecordWritable */
648   public RecordWriter serializeRecords(Object output) throws IOException {
649      return RecordAdapter.writer(this, output);
650   }
651
652   /**
653    * The XML record writer is buffered/{@link RecordAdapter}-backed, not O(1) streaming.
654    *
655    * @return Always <jk>false</jk>.
656    */
657   @Override /* RecordWritable */
658   public boolean isRecordStreaming() { return false; }
659
660   /**
661    * Recursively searches for the XML namespaces on the specified POJO and adds them to the serializer context object.
662    *
663    * @param o The POJO to check.
664    * @throws SerializeException Thrown if bean recursion occurred.
665    */
666   @SuppressWarnings({
667      "null", // Null handling verified by context or framework
668      "java:S3776", // Cognitive complexity acceptable for this specific logic
669   })
670   protected final void findNsfMappings(Object o) throws SerializeException {
671      ClassMeta<?> aType = null;                // The actual type
672
673      try {
674         aType = push(null, o, null);
675      } catch (MarshallingRecursionException e) {
676         throw new SerializeException(e);
677      }
678
679      if (nn(aType)) {
680         var ns = getXmlClassMeta(aType).getNamespace();
681         if (nn(ns) && nn(ns.uri))
682            addNamespace(ns);
683      }
684
685      // Handle recursion
686      if (nn(aType) && ! aType.isPrimitive()) {
687
688         BeanMap<?> bm = null;
689         if (aType.isBeanMap()) {
690            bm = (BeanMap<?>)o;
691         } else if (aType.isBean()) {
692            bm = toBeanMap(o);
693         } else if (aType.isDelegate()) {
694            var innerType = (ClassMeta<?>)((Delegate<?>)o).getBeanInfo();
695            var ns = Holder.of(getXmlClassMeta(innerType).getNamespace());
696            if (ns.isPresent()) {
697               if (nn(ns.get().uri))
698                  addNamespace(ns.get());
699               else
700                  ns.getAndUnset();
701            }
702
703            if (innerType.isBean()) {
704               innerType.getBeanMeta().getProperties().values().stream().filter(BeanPropertyMeta::canRead).forEach(x -> {
705                  ns.set(getXmlBeanPropertyMeta(x).getNamespace());
706                  if (ns.isPresent() && nn(ns.get().uri))
707                     addNamespace(ns.get());
708               });
709            } else if (innerType.isMap()) {
710               ((Map<?,?>)o).forEach((k, v) -> findNsfMappings(v));
711            } else if (innerType.isCollection()) {
712               ((Collection<?>)o).forEach(this::findNsfMappings);
713            }
714
715         } else if (aType.isMap()) {
716            ((Map<?,?>)o).forEach((k, v) -> findNsfMappings(v));
717         } else if (aType.isCollection()) {
718            ((Collection<?>)o).forEach(this::findNsfMappings);
719         } else if (aType.isArray() && ! aType.getElementType().isPrimitive()) {
720            for (var o2 : ((Object[])o))
721               findNsfMappings(o2);
722         }
723         if (nn(bm)) {
724            var checkNull = (Predicate<Object>)(x -> isKeepNullProperties() || nn(x));
725            bm.forEachValue(checkNull, (pMeta, key, value, thrown) -> {
726               var ns = getXmlBeanPropertyMeta(pMeta).getNamespace();
727               if (nn(ns) && nn(ns.uri))
728                  addNamespace(ns);
729
730               try {
731                  findNsfMappings(value);
732               } catch (@SuppressWarnings("unused") Exception x) {
733                  // Ignore
734               }
735            });
736         }
737      }
738
739      pop();
740   }
741
742   /**
743    * Default namespace.
744    *
745    * @see XmlSerializer.Builder#defaultNamespace(Namespace)
746    * @return
747    *    The default namespace URI for this document.
748    */
749   protected final Namespace getDefaultNamespace() { return defaultNamespace; }
750
751   /**
752    * Default namespaces.
753    *
754    * @see XmlSerializer.Builder#namespaces(Namespace...)
755    * @return
756    *    The default list of namespaces associated with this serializer.
757    *    <br>Never <jk>null</jk>.
758    *    <br>List is modifiable (namespaces can be added during serialization).
759    */
760   protected final List<Namespace> getNamespaces() { return namespaces == null ? l() : namespaces; }
761
762   @Override
763   public boolean isAddBeanTypes() { return super.isAddBeanTypes(); }
764
765   /**
766    * Add JSON type tags.
767    *
768    * @see XmlSerializer.Builder#disableJsonTags()
769    * @return
770    *    <jk>true</jk> if plain strings will be wrapped in <js>&lt;string&gt;</js> tags when serialized as root elements.
771    */
772   protected final boolean isAddJsonTags() { return ctx.addJsonTags; }
773
774   /**
775    * Add namespace URLs to the root element.
776    *
777    * @see XmlSerializer.Builder#addNamespaceUrisToRoot()
778    * @return
779    *    <jk>true</jk> if {@code xmlns:x} attributes are added to the root element for the default and all mapped namespaces.
780    */
781   protected final boolean isAddNamespaceUrisToRoot() { return addNamespaceUrisToRoot; }
782
783   /**
784    * Auto-detect namespace usage.
785    *
786    * @see XmlSerializer.Builder#disableAutoDetectNamespaces()
787    * @return
788    *    <jk>true</jk> if namespace usage is detected before serialization.
789    */
790   protected final boolean isAutoDetectNamespaces() { return autoDetectNamespaces; }
791
792   /**
793    * Enable support for XML namespaces.
794    *
795    * @see XmlSerializer.Builder#enableNamespaces()
796    * @return
797    *    <jk>false</jk> if XML output will not contain any namespaces regardless of any other settings.
798    */
799   protected final boolean isEnableNamespaces() { return enableNamespaces; }
800
801   /**
802    * Returns <jk>true</jk> if we're serializing HTML.
803    *
804    * <p>
805    * The difference in behavior is how empty non-void elements are handled.
806    * The XML serializer will produce a collapsed tag, whereas the HTML serializer will produce a start and end tag.
807    *
808    * @return <jk>true</jk> if we're generating HTML.
809    */
810   protected boolean isHtmlMode() { return false; }
811
812   /**
813    * Workhorse method.
814    *
815    * @param out The writer to send the output to.
816    * @param o The object to serialize.
817    * @param eType The expected type if this is a bean property value being serialized.
818    * @param keyName The property name or map key name.
819    * @param elementName The root element name.
820    * @param elementNamespace The namespace of the element.
821    * @param addNamespaceUris Flag indicating that namespace URIs need to be added.
822    * @param format The format to serialize the output to.
823    * @param isMixedOrText We're serializing mixed content, so don't use whitespace.
824    * @param preserveWhitespace
825    *    <jk>true</jk> if we're serializing {@link XmlFormat#MIXED_PWS} or {@link XmlFormat#TEXT_PWS}.
826    * @param pMeta The bean property metadata if this is a bean property being serialized.
827    * @return The same writer passed in so that calls to the writer can be chained.
828    * @throws SerializeException General serialization error occurred.
829    */
830   @SuppressWarnings({
831      "null", // Null handling verified by context or framework
832      "java:S3776", // Cognitive complexity acceptable for this specific logic
833      "java:S6541", // Single-threaded session contexts do not require synchronization
834      "java:S107", // Method has many parameters; acceptable for builder/configuration methods
835   })
836   protected ContentResult serializeAnything(XmlWriter out, Object o, ClassMeta<?> eType, String keyName, String elementName, Namespace elementNamespace, boolean addNamespaceUris, XmlFormat format,
837      boolean isMixedOrText, boolean preserveWhitespace, BeanPropertyMeta pMeta) throws SerializeException {
838
839      JsonType type = null;              // The type string (e.g. <type> or <x x='type'>
840      int i = isMixedOrText ? 0 : indent;       // Current indentation
841      ClassMeta<?> aType = null;     // The actual type
842      ClassMeta<?> wType = null;     // The wrapped type (delegate)
843      ClassMeta<?> sType; // The serialized type
844
845      aType = push2(keyName, o, eType);
846
847      if (eType == null)
848         eType = object();
849
850      // Handle recursion
851      if (aType == null) {
852         o = null;
853         aType = object();
854      }
855
856      // Handle Optional<X>
857      if (isOptional(aType)) {
858         o = getOptionalValue(o);
859         eType = getOptionalType(eType);
860         aType = getClassMetaForObject(o, object());
861      }
862
863      if (nn(o)) {
864
865         if (aType.isDelegate()) {
866            wType = aType;
867            eType = aType = (ClassMeta<?>)((Delegate<?>)o).getBeanInfo();
868         }
869
870         sType = aType;
871
872         // Swap if necessary
873         var swap = aType.getSwap(this);
874         if (nn(swap)) {
875            o = swap(swap, o);
876            sType = swap.getSwapClassMeta(this);
877
878            // If the getSwapClass() method returns Object, we need to figure out
879            // the actual type now.
880            if (sType.isObject())
881               sType = getClassMetaForObject(o);
882         }
883      } else {
884         sType = eType.getSerializedClassMeta(this);
885      }
886
887      // Does the actual type match the expected type?
888      boolean isExpectedType = true;
889      if (o == null || ! eType.same(aType)) {
890         if (eType.isNumber())
891            isExpectedType = aType.isNumber();
892         else if (eType.isMap())
893            isExpectedType = aType.isMap();
894         else if (eType.isCollectionOrArray() || eType.isStreamable())
895            isExpectedType = aType.isCollectionOrArray() || aType.isStreamable();
896         else
897            isExpectedType = false;
898      }
899
900      var resolvedDictionaryName = isExpectedType ? null : aType.getBeanDictionaryName();
901
902      // Note that the dictionary name may be specified on the actual type or the serialized type.
903      // HTML templates will have them defined on the serialized type.
904      var dictionaryName = aType.getBeanDictionaryName();
905      if (dictionaryName == null)
906         dictionaryName = sType.getBeanDictionaryName();
907
908      // char '\0' is interpreted as null.
909      if (nn(o) && sType.isChar() && ((Character)o).charValue() == 0)
910         o = null;
911
912      boolean isCollapsed = false;     // If 'true', this is a collection and we're not rendering the outer element.
913      boolean isRaw = (sType.isReader() || sType.isInputStream()) && nn(o);
914
915      // Get the JSON type string.
916      if (o == null) {
917         type = NULL;
918      } else if (sType.isCharSequence() || sType.isChar()) {
919         type = STRING;
920      } else if (sType.isNumber()) {
921         type = NUMBER;
922      } else if (sType.isBoolean()) {
923         type = BOOLEAN;
924      } else if (sType.isMapOrBean()) {
925         isCollapsed = getXmlClassMeta(sType).getFormat() == COLLAPSED;
926         type = OBJECT;
927      } else if (sType.isCollectionOrArray() || sType.isStreamable()) {
928         isCollapsed = (format == COLLAPSED && ! addNamespaceUris);
929         type = ARRAY;
930      } else {
931         type = STRING;
932      }
933
934      if (format.isOneOf(MIXED, MIXED_PWS, TEXT, TEXT_PWS, XMLTEXT) && type.isOneOf(NULL, STRING, NUMBER, BOOLEAN))
935         isCollapsed = true;
936
937      // Is there a name associated with this bean?
938
939      var name = keyName;
940      if (elementName == null && nn(dictionaryName)) {
941         elementName = dictionaryName;
942         isExpectedType = nn(o);  // preserve type='null' when it's null.
943      }
944
945      if (elementName == null) {
946         elementName = name;
947         name = null;
948      }
949
950      if (eq(name, elementName))
951         name = null;
952
953      if (isEnableNamespaces()) {
954         if (elementNamespace == null)
955            elementNamespace = getXmlClassMeta(sType).getNamespace();
956         if (elementNamespace == null)
957            elementNamespace = getXmlClassMeta(aType).getNamespace();
958         if (nn(elementNamespace) && elementNamespace.uri == null)
959            elementNamespace = null;
960         if (elementNamespace == null)
961            elementNamespace = defaultNamespace;
962      } else {
963         elementNamespace = null;
964      }
965
966      // Do we need a carriage return after the start tag?
967      boolean cr = nn(o) && (sType.isMapOrBean() || sType.isCollectionOrArray()) && ! isMixedOrText;
968
969      var en = elementName;
970      if (en == null && ! isRaw && isAddJsonTags()) {
971         en = type.toString();
972         type = null;
973      }
974
975      boolean encodeEn = nn(elementName);
976      var ns = (elementNamespace == null ? null : elementNamespace.name);
977      String dns = null;
978      String elementNs = null;
979      if (isEnableNamespaces()) {
980         dns = elementName == null && nn(defaultNamespace) ? defaultNamespace.name : null;
981         elementNs = elementName == null ? dns : ns;
982         if (elementName == null)
983            elementNamespace = null;
984      }
985
986      // Render the start tag.
987      if (! isCollapsed) {
988         if (nn(en)) {
989            out.oTag(i, elementNs, en, encodeEn);
990            if (addNamespaceUris) {
991               out.attr((String)null, "xmlns", defaultNamespace.getUri());
992
993               for (var n : namespaces)
994                  out.attr("xmlns", n.getName(), n.getUri());
995            }
996            if (! isExpectedType) {
997               if (nn(resolvedDictionaryName))
998                  out.attr(dns, getBeanTypePropertyName(eType), resolvedDictionaryName);
999               else if (nn(type) && type != STRING)
1000                  out.attr(dns, getBeanTypePropertyName(eType), type);
1001            }
1002            if (nn(name))
1003               out.attr(MarshallingSession.NAME_PROPERTY_NAME, name);
1004         } else {
1005            out.i(i);
1006         }
1007         if (o == null && (sType.isBoolean() || sType.isNumber()) && ! sType.isNullable())
1008            o = sType.getPrimitiveDefault();
1009
1010         if (nn(o) && ! (sType.isMapOrBean() || en == null))
1011            out.w('>');
1012
1013         if (cr && ! (sType.isMapOrBean()))
1014            out.nl(i + 1);
1015      }
1016
1017      var rc = CR_ELEMENTS;
1018
1019      // Render the tag contents.
1020      if (nn(o)) {
1021         if (sType.isBean()) {
1022            rc = serializeBeanMap(out, toBeanMap(o), elementNamespace, isCollapsed, isMixedOrText);
1023         } else if (sType.isMap() || (nn(wType) && wType.isMap())) {
1024            if (o instanceof BeanMap o2)
1025               rc = serializeBeanMap(out, o2, elementNamespace, isCollapsed, isMixedOrText);
1026            else
1027               rc = serializeMap(out, (Map)o, sType, eType.getKeyType(), eType.getValueType(), isMixedOrText);
1028         } else if (sType.isCollection() || sType.isArray() || (nn(wType) && (wType.isCollection() || wType.isArray()))) {
1029            if (isCollapsed)
1030               indent--;
1031            serializeCollection(out, o, sType, eType, pMeta, isMixedOrText);
1032            if (isCollapsed)
1033               indent++;
1034         } else if (sType.isUri() || (nn(pMeta) && pMeta.isUri())) {
1035            // Must come before isCharSequence/isChar: @Uri-annotated String properties (where sType is String but pMeta.isUri() is true) need to route here for URI text emission.
1036            out.textUri(o);
1037         } else if (sType.isCharSequence() || sType.isChar()) {
1038            if (isXmlText(format, sType))
1039               out.append(o);
1040            else
1041               out.text(o, preserveWhitespace);
1042         } else if (sType.isNumber() || sType.isBoolean()) {
1043            out.append(o);
1044         } else if (sType.isDate()) {
1045            out.text(serializeDate((Date)o, sType));
1046         } else if (sType.isCalendar()) {
1047            out.text(serializeCalendar(o, sType));
1048         } else if (sType.isTemporal()) {
1049            out.text(serializeTemporal((TemporalAccessor)o, sType));
1050         } else if (sType.isDuration()) {
1051            out.text(serializeDuration((Duration)o));
1052         } else if (sType.isPeriod()) {
1053            out.text(serializePeriod((Period)o));
1054         } else if (sType.isStreamable()) {
1055            if (isCollapsed)
1056               indent--;
1057            serializeStreamable(out, o, sType, eType, pMeta, isMixedOrText);
1058            if (isCollapsed)
1059               indent++;
1060         } else if (sType.isReader()) {
1061            pipe((Reader)o, out, SerializerSession::handleThrown);
1062         } else if (sType.isInputStream()) {
1063            pipe((InputStream)o, out, SerializerSession::handleThrown);
1064         } else {
1065            if (isXmlText(format, sType))
1066               out.append(toString(o));
1067            else
1068               out.text(toString(o));
1069         }
1070      }
1071
1072      pop();
1073
1074      // Render the end tag.
1075      if (! isCollapsed) {
1076         if (nn(en)) {
1077            if (rc == CR_EMPTY) {
1078               if (isHtmlMode())
1079                  out.w('>').eTag(elementNs, en, encodeEn);
1080               else
1081                  out.w('/').w('>');
1082            } else if (rc == CR_VOID || o == null) {
1083               out.w('/').w('>');
1084            } else
1085               out.ie(cr && rc != CR_MIXED ? i : 0).eTag(elementNs, en, encodeEn);
1086         }
1087         if (! isMixedOrText)
1088            out.nl(i);
1089      }
1090
1091      return rc;
1092   }
1093}
